zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Goring於大約1531年出生在英國哈普爾易其爾 曼諾時，她的父親Sir William Goring32歲，母親Elizabeth Covert27歲。她於1550年與Sir Francis Browne在英國肯特艾爾坦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1594年享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾易亞斯特 泰黑利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Goring于大约1531年出生在英国哈普爾易其爾 曼諾时，她的父亲Sir William Goring32岁，母亲Elizabeth Covert27岁。她于1550年与Sir Francis Browne在英国肯特艾爾坦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1594年享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾易亞斯特 泰黑利。

nameMeanings.name: Goring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Oxfordshire and West Sussex named Goring, from Old English Gāringas ‘people of Gāra’, a short form of various compound names with the first element gār ‘spear’.

variants.name: Goering
meanings: topographic name derived from Slavic gora ‘mountain, hill’. Compare Goring .

variants.name: Gorringe
meanings: English (Surrey and Suffolk): variant of   Goring  .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Goring was born about 1531, in Itchel Manor, Hampshire, England, her father, Sir William Goring, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth Covert, was 27. She married Sir Francis Browne in 1550, in Eltham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1594, at the age of 64, and was buried in East Tytherley, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Goring est née environ 1531, à Itchel Manor, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Goring, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Covert, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Francis Browne en 1550, à Eltham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1594, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à East Tytherley, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Goring um 1531 in Itchel Manor, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Goring 32 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Covert 27. it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Goring è nata il circa 1531 nel Itchel Manor, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Goring, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Covert, aveva 27 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Ann Goringが約1531年にイギリスハンプシュアイアイトチェル マノーで生まれた時，父Sir William Goringは32歳，母Elizabeth Covertは27歳であった。1550年にイギリスケントエルサムでSir Francis Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1594年に64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアエアスト トイスエルリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Goring(이)가 대략 1531년 영국 함프실르 잇트헬 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Goring(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Covert(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 켄트 엘섬에서 Sir Francis Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이스트 타이더리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Goring родилась около 1531 г. в местности ичел манор, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Goring было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Covert, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Francis Browne в 1550 г. в местности элтам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1594 г. в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст титирли, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.
